message.content: The screenshot shows a beige background with text. At the top, there is a line of garbled text: `|u0392|u03af|u03b2|u03bb|u03bf|u03c2 |u03c4|u03b9|u06e6 |u038|u03b5|u03ed |u2014 Sacred Diagrams of the Pleroma` (note: the sequence includes non - standard characters like `u06e6` and `u038` which appear out of place, likely encoding errors). Below this, centered in a larger, bold font, is the text `The Book of Jeu`. There are no diagram layout issues visible, but the top text has random Unicode - like sequences (e.g., `u0392`, `u03af`, etc.) that seem to be encoding errors, as they do not form coherent words and are placed where normal text should be.
